chunks.text: The notion of success has changed with the times.
Once
to rise in a big company and retain a stable position was the typical description of success.
But today, the younger generation has come to hold a different preference.
Rather than an expensive car or house
there is a stronger inclined toward free time and meaningful work.
Freelance work, starting a business, remote work.
New ways of working have gained in popularity.
People have begun to seek a value that cannot be measured by salary alone.
Sociologists call this change " a phase shift of values.
" Resistance to rating and status has grown
and the happiness and health of the individual have become the prime concern.
Nevertheless, it is not easy to completely abandon the conventional view of success.
The expectation of the parents' generation, the pressure of society, one's own unease.
What matters is to achieve a life where we feel we are living as ourselves
rather than " success as described by others.
" Success is to live according to one's own values.
" This may be the definition of success for the twenty - first century.
To walk the rough road of life with our own feet.
That is where the truly satisfactory fulfillment lies.
